positive: A symmetrical, deeply contrasting stylized illustration of bioluminescent nocturnal forest fauna and flora. Central composition featuring a majestic stag silhouette surrounded by glowing, intricate root systems and hovering luminous spores. The style should be a neo-traditional tattoo flash combined with ethereal watercolor washes, emphasizing clean outlines and strong black contrast against vibrant midnight blues, deep emerald greens, and pops of cosmic indigo light. Highly detailed, print-grade artwork, clean silhouette, centered, symmetrical, perfect for apparel print.
